elements.description: A hardcover book with a colorful abstract design lies open on a white surface, its pages slightly curled. The lighting highlights the texture of the paper and the embossed title on the cover. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

A flat-screen monitor displays a paused video frame with a colorful thumbnail, surrounded by a simple black frame. The screen glows softly against the white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

A hand holding a smartphone with a vibrant app interface open, showing a cartoon-style learning icon. The background is pure white, emphasizing the bright colors of the screen. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

A laptop sits open on a white surface, its screen displaying a course enrollment page with a blurred-out interface. The keyboard and trackpad are sleek and modern, reflecting soft light. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
